boardMarkdown:
# Fixture PP&D Daemon Task Board

Legend: `[ ]` needed, `[~]` in progress, `[x]` complete, `[!]` blocked. Broad failed work is parked in Deferred Repair Notes while narrow recovery tasks remain selectable.

## Checklist

- [x] Create the isolated PP&D workspace marker and local ignore rules.
- [x] Recover the public source inventory validator with a sentinel-preserving one-file implementation
- [ ] Add next independent PP&D source inventory fixture validation

## Deferred Broad Items

These items failed as broad tasks and are intentionally not selectable while narrower recovery work remains available.

- Parked public source inventory broad task: Add the broad public source inventory validator in one pass. Superseded by accepted narrower recovery: Recover the public source inventory validator with a sentinel-preserving one-file implementation.
expectedSelectedTitle: Add next independent PP&D source inventory fixture validation
purpose: Prove a superseded broad blocked task is preserved only in deferred notes while the daemon still selects the next independent needed task.
acceptedRecoveryTitle: Recover the public source inventory validator with a sentinel-preserving one-file implementation
supersededBlockedTaskTitle: Add the broad public source inventory validator in one pass
